name: byoky
description: Bring Your Own Key — Secure wallet for your AI credentials

scripts.test:e2e: pnpm build:core && pnpm build:sdk && pnpm build:extension && npx playwright test --config e2e/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:headed: pnpm build:core && pnpm build:sdk && pnpm build:extension && npx playwright test --config e2e/playwright.config.ts --headed
scripts.marketing:install: cd marketing && pnpm install --ignore-workspace && pnpm exec playwright install chromium
scripts.marketing:capture:extension: pnpm build:core && pnpm build:sdk && pnpm build:extension && cd marketing && pnpm capture:extension
scripts.marketing:desktop: pnpm marketing:capture:extension && pnpm marketing:capture:web && pnpm marketing:compose && pnpm marketing:narrate && pnpm marketing:video
scripts.marketing:all: pnpm marketing:capture:extension && pnpm marketing:capture:web && pnpm marketing:capture:ios && pnpm marketing:capture:android && pnpm marketing:compose && pnpm marketing:narrate && pnpm marketing:video
